examples: I found this old bookshop entirely by serendipity while I was lost exploring the city.
Meeting my best friend at college was pure serendipity.
The speaker gave an eloquent speech about climate change that moved the entire audience.
Her writings are eloquent and powerful, expressing complex emotions with simple words.
The beauty of cherry blossoms is ephemeral, lasting only a few weeks each spring.
His fame proved to be ephemeral, remembered only briefly after the scandal.
The river meanders through the valley, creating beautiful oxbow lakes.
We decided to meander through the old town, stopping at every shop that caught our eye.
The benevolent donor gave millions to establish scholarships for underprivileged students.
She has a benevolent nature and is always willing to help those in need.
Wolves are gregarious animals that hunt and live in coordinated packs.
He's a very gregarious person who enjoys being surrounded by friends at all times.
The jubilant fans celebrated wildly when their team won the championship.
The streets were filled with jubilant crowds celebrating the end of the war.
Political prisoners languished in overcrowded cells for years without trial.
The neglected beauty of the abandoned mansion continued to languish beneath layers of dust.
I felt a wave of nostalgia looking at old photographs from my childhood.
The movie captures the nostalgia of simpler times perfectly, making audiences long for the past.
Her wanderlust took her across five continents in just two years of travel.
He was seized by wanderlust after reading travel journals from famous explorers.
